---
title: "Personal"
---

 
I'm originally from Nara, Japan. 
I'm enthusiastic about watching sports, especially baseball and basketball. I visited several MLB ballparks in the US.

::: {.column-page}
::: {.gallery-grid}

::: {.gallery-item}
![Orix Buffaloes](pictures/hobby.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
![My Home Town](pictures/hometown.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
![Detroit Pistons](pictures/pistons.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
![Comerica Park](pictures/detroit_tigers.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::

:::
:::
